sizeBound: v1 is bounded by the current seed corpus (~30 attribution records, 8 religion records, 21 myth records). The rows are non-redundant; padding to 500 would mean near-duplicates. The set reaches the 500-1000 band as the M2 corpus enrichment adds source records. This is an honest bound, not a silent truncation.
note: High-headroom held-out market benchmark for Sophia-Wisdom-4B vs same-size open models. Constructed traps; headroom PROVEN only by running tools/run_same_size_market_baselines.py. NEVER use for training/RL.
decontamination: Wired into tools/build_local_sophia_dataset.py --check; disjoint from data/reference_holdout_traps.json (asserted by --check).
